title: TTD leads as options breadth stays risk-on
summary: Fact: Today’s bounded evidence is concentrated in TTD, FLY, IBRX, and IGLD, with broader ThetaData showing risk-on options breadth: 187 bullish, 55 bearish, 118 neutral, and 9 held bullish names versus 1 held bearish name. Inference: TTD has the cleanest alignment because direct AI ad-attribution and Russell-index catalysts are supported by a 7-day bullish options streak. FLY has positive space-contract and launch headlines, but options flow is neutral and implied volatility is very high, so the tape is not confirming the news with the same force. IBRX has call-heavy flow around index-inclusion speculation and a future FDA date, while IGLD is the weakest evidence set because the gold headline is mixed and its bearish options data is stale.

general.llm_summary: Today’s discovery skews catalyst-heavy, led by direct M&A headlines in INMD, STXS, and MDA, plus AI/services momentum around CTSH. The cleanest opportunity signals are acquisition-related, while the main risks come from mixed analyst actions, insider-sale optics, and competitive pressure in online betting.

top_opportunities.why: Steel Partners offered to acquire InMode for $16.75 per share in cash; highest-confidence direct catalyst, though no ThetaData confirmation was available.
MDA Space announced a firm offer to acquire a majority stake in CLS, adding AI-driven Earth observation analytics and satellite IoT exposure.
Multiple AI-related catalysts appeared, including workforce scaling, Google-linked coverage, and a sovereign AI partnership in EMEA.

top_risks.why: FanDuel’s Alberta launch is positive, but risks are elevated by a price-target cut and headlines tying prediction-market fundraising to pressure on betting stocks.
Rule 10b5-1 director sales create insider-sale optics risk, with no offsetting ThetaData confirmation in the provided evidence.
Positive production expectations and a Fitch upgrade are partly offset by Jefferies and UBS price-target cuts, leaving the signal mixed.

caveats: General analysis is independent of held positions; portfolio read-throughs are listed separately.

outcome_tracking.policy: Judge every active pick every 5 trading days, append a new outcome snapshot, and keep the original pick_score immutable.

calibration_notes: pick_score is an immutable point-in-time prediction.
Outcome snapshots are appended every 5 trading days for as long as the pick remains active.
Future calibration should compare direction-aware return against SPY-relative return.

FLY has positive space-contract and launch headlines, but options flow is neutral and implied volatility is very high, so the tape is not confirming the news with the same force.
